title: Validate, benchmark, and close out telemetry tranche
summary: Run the full validation gate, benchmark representative commands, and close the telemetry initiative cleanly.
scope_items: Run targeted and full repo validation after the telemetry slices land.
Benchmark representative commands before final closeout.
Close completed tasks and close the initiative after validation passes.
done_when_items: Full validation passes on the final telemetry tree.
Benchmark evidence shows telemetry remains operationally acceptable.
The initiative closes with aligned machine and rendered surfaces.
